items.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
items.content: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.
items.contentSnippet: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.

items.title: Discover this year’s trending summer travel destinations and activities
items.content: Google Flights and Search trends told us what’s on everyone’s mind this year as it relates to summer travel.
items.contentSnippet: Google Flights and Search trends told us what’s on everyone’s mind this year as it relates to summer travel.
items.summary: 根据Google Flights及搜索趋势数据，本文分析了今年夏季旅游的热门目的地与活动趋势。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome

items.title: Voting is live: Help choose the next Doodle for Google winner
items.content: It’s time to choose the next Doodle for Google winner — and every vote counts. Meet the five student finalists and make your pick.
items.contentSnippet: It’s time to choose the next Doodle for Google winner — and every vote counts. Meet the five student finalists and make your pick.
items.summary: Google正式开启投票，邀请公众从五位学生设计的决赛作品中选出下一届Google涂鸦大赛获胜者，每个投票都将影响最终结果。

items.title: Nest thermostats have saved users an estimated $14 billion and 200 billion kWh of energy since 2011.
items.content: Google Nest thermostats saved 200 billion kWh of energy since 2011. With energy-saving features, Nest helps get the most out of your home.
items.contentSnippet: Google Nest thermostats saved 200 billion kWh of energy since 2011. With energy-saving features, Nest helps get the most out of your home.

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.content: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.contentSnippet: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.

items.title: Grow with Google's event discussed AI in the workplace with Fortune 500 company leaders.
items.content: Our Leading the AI Transformation summit equipped execs to drive AI adoption, emphasizing how people use AI to unlock potential.

items.title: Gemini is stopping harmful ads before people ever see them
items.content: Gemini-powered tools vastly improved our ability to stop deceptive ads, and we’re continuing to evolve to stay ahead of bad actors.
items.contentSnippet: Gemini-powered tools vastly improved our ability to stop deceptive ads, and we’re continuing to evolve to stay ahead of bad actors.
items.summary: Gemini驱动的工具大幅提升了阻止欺骗性广告的能力，通过持续进化应对不良行为者，在用户看到有害广告前就将其拦截。

items.title: New ways we’re protecting businesses on Maps
items.content: The latest protections help detect fake reviews faster and block suspicious edits before they appear.
items.contentSnippet: The latest protections help detect fake reviews faster and block suspicious edits before they appear.

items.title: We’re advancing wetland restoration and carbon removal science in Google’s backyard.
